sentence: DNP Corporation Service Privacy Policy
1. What is the Privacy Policy?
DNP Corporation (hereinafter referred to as the "Company") collects, uses and provides personal information based on the user's consent,
We actively guarantee the rights of users (the right to self-determination of personal information).

The company complies with the relevant laws and personal information protection regulations and guidelines of the Republic of Korea that information and communications service providers must comply with.
“Personal Information Handling Policy” means the guidelines that the company must follow so that users can use the service with confidence by protecting their valuable personal information.
This privacy policy applies to all services of DNP Corporation (hereinafter referred to as "services").
2. Collection of personal information
The service does not collect personal information.
3. Youth Protection Policy

1 Based on the Youth Protection Act, the company will do its best to protect youth so that they are not exposed to harmful substances such as various types of violence, adult information, and obscene information.
2 The company will work with the Information and Communication Ethics Committee to continue its own purification activities to prevent harmful substances from being circulated within the service.
3 For the protection of youth, the company will designate a person in charge of youth protection as follows and take various actions to create a healthy Internet environment.
4. Other matters
4-1 Personal information related report and dispute settlement

If you need to report or consult about personal information infringement, please contact the Korea Information Security Agency (KISA) Personal Information Infringement Report Center. In addition, if you have suffered financial or mental damage through personal information infringement, you can apply for damage relief to the Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee.
Privacy Infringement Report Center
(without area code) 118
http://privacy.kisa.or.kr
Supreme Prosecutor's Office Cyber Crime Investigation Team
cybercid@spo.go.kr
National Police Agency Cyber Terror Response Center
(without area code) 182
http://cyberbureau.police.go.kr
4-2 Do you have any questions about personal information protection?

The privacy policy may be amended for the purpose of reflecting changes in laws or services. If the personal information processing policy is changed, the company will post the change, and the changed personal information processing policy will take effect from the date of posting.
However, we will notify you at least 30 days in advance when there is a significant change in user rights, such as changes in the items of personal information collected and the purpose of use.
4-3 Contact
Address: Room 605, Smart Contents Center, 11-41, Shimin-daero 327beon-gil, Dongan-gu, Anyang-si, Gyeonggi-do
Effective Date: January 01, 2018
